data.title: XRP projected to reach $2.35-$2.88 by year-end despite current weakness, supported by oversold technical indicators.
data.description: The forecast for XRP indicates a possible rebound to a range of $2.35 to $2.88 by December 31st. This potential recovery is supported by technical analysis pointing to oversold conditions close to key support levels.

data.title: BNB price predicted to hit $1,000 in 4 weeks, currently consolidating near $840 with breakout expected above $920.
data.description: Predictions are indicating that the price of BNB is expected to reach $1,000 within the next four weeks. Currently, the price is consolidating around $840, positioning for a potential bullish breakout above the resistance level of $920. This potential increase represents a significant jump from the current price.

data.title: ETH expected to reach $3,200-$3,300 by Jan 2026 amid bullish signals. Targets can be hit in 4-6 weeks if resistance breaks.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ethereum is currently experiencing a positive uptrend, as indicated by the MACD turning upwards. Analysts predict that the price of ETH could hit targets between $3,200 and $3,300 within the next 4 to 6 weeks, provided it breaks through key resistance levels.

data.title: Crypto M&A reaches record $8.6B in 2025 with soaring deal numbers, led by Coinbase's acquisition of Deribit.
data.description: Cryptocurrency transactions witnessed a significant surge this year, with the number of deals reportedly increasing. The total value of these deals reached a record high of $8.6 billion. The most notable transaction was Coinbase's acquisition of Deribit, setting a new record in the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: Bitcoin may reach $95,000-$120,000 by January 2025, supported by oversold RSI and bullish MACD signals. Currently trading near $87,500.
data.description: Bitcoin's Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating oversold conditions and the bullish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum are pointing towards a potential surge in the price of BTC. This suggests that Bitcoin could reach a target range of $95,000 to $120,000 within the next 4 to 6 weeks, despite the current consolidation phase hovering around $87,500.

data.title: Tuya Smart launches Hey Tuya, a Super AI Assistant for everyday life. Company listed as TUYA on NYSE and HKEX.
data.description: Could the comparable real-life AI assistant to J.A.R.V.I.S from Marvel’s Iron Man franchise be on the verge of becoming a reality? A recent press release from Tuya Smart in Hangzhou, China, dated December 25, 2025, revealed the introduction of Hey Tuya, a state-of-the-art Super AI Life platform. Tuya Smart, known for its AI cloud services, made the announcement, signifying a potential step forward in AI technology. This news hints at the possibility of a significant leap in AI capabilities, with Tuya Smart being a leading global AI cloud platform service provider.

data.title: China approves Innovent's TABOSUN for neoadjuvant treatment of MSI-H/dMMR colon cancer.
data.description: The FDA has recently given approval for TABOSUN® (ipilimumab N01 injection) to be used alongside TYVYT® (sintilimab injection) in the neoadjuvant therapy of individuals diagnosed with stage IIB-III resectable colon cancer that is microsatellite instability-high or mismatch repair deficient (MSI-H/dMMR). This treatment combination marks a significant advancement in the medical field for patients with this specific type of colon cancer.

data.title: Thailand welcomes 2026 with countdown celebrations in Phayao and Su-ngai Kolok; nationwide festivities across Bangkok and provinces.
data.description: Thailand's Tourism Authority is highlighting two major regional events in addition to New Year celebrations in Bangkok and various provincial destinations to usher in 2026. The country is gearing up for the New Year with a comprehensive countdown program across the nation. On December 25, 2025, the announcement was made in Bangkok, emphasizing the importance of these events.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs saw $825M losses in 5 days with the US as the top seller, losing $175M on Christmas Eve.
data.description: The Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) continued to experience a decline on Christmas Eve with a decrease in value during the final US trading session. This resulted in approximately $175 million in net outflows for the ETF.

data.title: In 2025, social engineering scams cost the crypto industry billions. Stay vigilant to protect your assets from rising threats.
data.description: This year, cyber criminals specializing in cryptocurrencies have implemented highly sophisticated social engineering tactics. Recent advancements in artificial intelligence technologies suggest that identifying and preventing these fraudulent activities will become increasingly challenging.
